description: Methodological sequence: derived Markdown transcription of reference equations → exact comparison blocked by ambiguous typography; authoritative source metadata (PDF-authenticated frozen equation objects from 020) → ambiguity resolved; comparison recovers from STALE_NONAUTHORITATIVE/BLOCKED to CANDIDATE to ACTIVE_VERIFIED.

step_1_derived_transcription.source: Derived Markdown transcription of reference paper equations
step_1_derived_transcription.block_reason: Five categories of typographic ambiguity prevent exact comparison

step_2_source_authentication.source: 020 reference_objects/ (PDF-authenticated frozen equation objects: ReferenceEq5.wl, ThermalDefinitions.wl, D2Reference.wl, D3Reference.wl, OrderedSumConventions.wl)

step_3_recovery.reason: PDF-authenticated frozen equation objects resolve all five ambiguity categories; exact comparison now possible

step_4_exact_regression.evidence: Exact normalized regression verifies formula-to-reference agreement after notation conversion

category_1.name: thermal_function_subscript
category_1.description: The subscript specifying which thermal function (e.g., ℱ_E vs ℱ_T) could not be reliably distinguished in the derived Markdown transcription
category_1.resolution: PDF-authenticated ThermalDefinitions.wl provides exact frozen definitions

category_2.name: real_part_scope
category_2.description: The scope of the real-part operator Re[...] was ambiguous — whether it applies to a single term or the entire expression
category_2.resolution: ReferenceEq5.wl freezes the exact operator scope from the PDF

category_3.name: spatial_versus_band_derivative_index
category_3.description: Whether a derivative index refers to a spatial coordinate (k) or a band index (n) could not be resolved from transcription alone
category_3.resolution: D2Reference.wl, D3Reference.wl freeze exact indexed expressions

category_4.name: degraded_appendix_transcription
category_4.description: The appendix of the paper contained degraded typography whose transcription was unreliable
category_4.resolution: PDF direct authentication bypasses degraded transcription step

category_5.name: three_band_gap_index_placement
category_5.description: The placement of gap indices in three-band summations was ambiguous in the transcribed form
category_5.resolution: OrderedSumConventions.wl freezes the exact summation convention

authority_order.reason: PDF is the original publication medium; transcription introduces potential errors

required_artifacts_for_recovery.reason: PDF-authenticated source metadata resolves all five ambiguity categories

note: The original copyrighted paper PDF is NOT included. Only the 020 reference_objects (export-safe frozen equation objects) and the ambiguity resolution methodology are exported.
